SELECT t2.activity_status, COUNT(*) 
FROM fact_migrant_personal t1 
JOIN fact_migrant_employment t3 ON t1.migrant_id = t3.migrant_id 
JOIN dim_employment_status t2 ON t3.employment_status_id = t2.employment_status_id 
WHERE t1.education_at_migration_code = 'Secondary' 
GROUP BY t2.activity_status 
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC 
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

question: प्रत्येक व्यवसायाच्या वर्णनासाठी, मृत्यूच्या वेळी विवाहित असलेल्या व्यक्तींचा विचार करून, मृत्यूला उलटलेल्या सरासरी वर्षांची संख्या आणि व्यक्तींच्या आयडीची (IDs) एकूण संख्या किती आहे? यामध्ये अशाच व्यवसायांचा समावेश करा जिथे व्यक्तींची संख्या किमान एक आहे आणि निकाल मृत्यूला उलटलेल्या सरासरी वर्षांच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION, AVG(T2.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH), COUNT(T2.PERSON_ID) FROM DIM_OCCUPATION_CODES AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION AS T3 ON T1.OCCUPATION_ID = T3.OCCUPATION_ID INNER JOIN FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS AS T2 ON T3.DECEASED_ID = T2.DECEASED_ID WHERE T2.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_DEATH_CODE = 'Married' GROUP BY T1.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION HAVING COUNT(T2.PERSON_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION, 
    AVG(fd.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH) AS average_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fd.PERSON_ID) AS total_person_ids
FROM 
    FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION fo
JOIN 
    DIM_OCCUPATION_CODES d ON fo.OCCUPATION_ID = d.OCCUPATION_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS fd ON fo.DECEASED_ID = fd.DECEASED_ID
WHERE 
    fd.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_DEATH_CODE = 'Married'
GROUP BY 
    d.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fd.PERSON_ID) >= 1
ORDER BY 
    average_years_since_death DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION, 
    AVG(fd.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH) AS average_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT fd.PERSON_ID) AS total_person_ids
FROM 
    FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION fo
JOIN 
    DIM_OCCUPATION_CODES d ON fo.OCCUPATION_ID = d.OCCUPATION_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS fd ON fo.DECEASED_ID = fd.DECEASED_ID
WHERE 
    fd.MARITAL_STATUS_AT_DEATH_CODE = 'Married'
GROUP BY 
    d.OCCUPATION_DESCRIPTION
HAVING

    average_years_since_death DESC;

question: प्रत्येक व्यवसाय कोड, मृत्यूपासूनची सरासरी वर्षे आणि त्या कोडसाठी मृत व्यक्तींची एकूण संख्या यांची यादी करा, ज्यामध्ये फक्त एकापेक्षा जास्त मृत व्यक्तींशी संबंधित व्यवसाय कोड समाविष्ट करा आणि निकाल मृत्यूपासूनच्या सरासरी वर्षांनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
